footer.about: Family-run holiday apartments right by the sea – on Thassos and on the Greek mainland.

home.title: Dimitra Beach Apartments – Seaside Holiday Homes | Thassos & Mainland
home.description: Dimitra Beach Apartments: stylish holiday homes right by the sea – on Thassos (Skala Potamias, 700 m to Golden Beach) and on the Greek mainland in Nea Karvali. Get in touch.
home.heroSub: Two coasts, one feeling of arriving. Stylish apartments right by the sea – on the island of Thassos and on the Greek mainland.
home.auswahlLead: Two coasts, one promise: the sea right on your doorstep. Follow the scent of pines to the island of Thassos – or stay on the mainland, where the waves brush your terrace.

thassosCard.text: 3 apartments & a penthouse, just 700 m from Golden Beach. Pine scent and sunsets over the Aegean.
thassosCard.alt: View over Skala Potamias and the sea on Thassos

festlandCard.text: Opposite Thassos, near Kavala. Apartments directly on the water – a quiet beach holiday away from the island.
festlandCard.alt: Sunny terrace with mountain views – holiday home on the Greek mainland

welcome.alt1: Living area with natural materials, rattan and sandy tones in a Dimitra apartment
welcome.title: A home by the sea – with a Greek soul
welcome.p1: With us you don't check in – you arrive. Dimitra Beach Apartments are family-run, with warm earthy tones, natural materials and the sea always in view. Real, warm, unpretentious.
welcome.p2: Every apartment is fully equipped – your own kitchen, a private terrace, everything for carefree days. The Aegean takes care of the rest. All you choose is the coast.

items.title: The first coffee
items.text: Barefoot onto the terrace, the sun still soft – the day is all yours.

items.title: Simply drift
items.text: Back from Golden Beach, a book, the murmur of the Aegean. Nothing more is needed.

items.title: Golden hour
items.text: As the sun sinks into the sea and the sky shows its colours – new every evening.

ausstattung.title: Everything's here. Just arrive.
ausstattung.lead: What both houses have in common – so you don't have to worry about a thing.

items.title: Free Wi-Fi
items.text: Fast internet throughout the apartment – for holidays or a workation.

items.title: Private parking
items.text: Free, private parking space right at the property.

items.title: Garden & barbecue
items.text: A cosy garden with a barbecue for balmy summer evenings.

items.title: Fully equipped kitchen
items.text: Fridge, oven, hob, coffee machine, toaster & kettle.

items.title: Terrace with sea view
items.text: Private terrace with a seating area – the finest view included.

items.title: Beach within reach
items.text: On Thassos just 700 m to Golden Beach. On the mainland right on the water.

galerie.title: Pictures that make you long for the sea

lage.title: Quick to reach, hard to leave
lage.lead: Thassos is easily reached via Kavala airport and a short ferry crossing. The key distances from Skala Potamias:

kontakt.title: Check availability & book directly
kontakt.text: See live availability and prices in our booking tool – where you can book in just a few steps. For personal questions we're always here for you directly.

form.success: Thank you! Your message has been received – we'll be in touch shortly.
form.heading: Have a question? Write to us.
form.name: Name
form.consentPost: and consent to my data being processed to handle my message.

thassos.title: Thassos – Holiday Apartments in Skala Potamias | Dimitra Beach Apartments
thassos.description: Dimitra Beach Apartments on Thassos: 3 apartments & a penthouse in Skala Potamias, just 700 m from Golden Beach. Sea view, own kitchen, terrace. Get in touch.

hero.alt: Terrace with sea view over Skala Potamias on Thassos
hero.scriptSub: the green island of the Aegean
hero.sub: Three apartments and a penthouse, nestled in the greenery of Skala Potamias – and just 700 m from the famous Golden Beach.

intro.title: Island calm, the beach on your doorstep
intro.lead: Pine forests, crystal-clear water, the island's relaxed pace. A morning dip in the sea, midday shade under olive trees, evening tavernas by the harbour. Our apartments sit quietly yet right in the middle – you choose the size, Thassos does the rest.

items.name: Apartment Olive
items.desc: A bright apartment with its own terrace onto the garden – ideal for couples and small families who like it quiet.

items.name: Apartment Aegean
items.desc: Open living/dining area with a fully equipped kitchen and seating area – room for sociable holiday days.

items.name: Apartment Pine
items.desc: A sheltered apartment with a comfortable bedroom and its own terrace – to breathe out.

items.name: Penthouse Dimitra
items.desc: Our gem: a generous penthouse with a roof terrace and panoramic views over Skala Potamias out to sea – sunsets included.

lage.title: Right in Skala Potamias
lage.lead: Beach, tavernas and harbour within reach – getting here via Kavala airport and a short ferry is easy.

cta.title: Ready for Thassos?
cta.lead: Tell us your preferred dates – we'll check availability and get back to you personally.

festland.title: Mainland – Holiday Apartments in Nea Karvali near Kavala | Dimitra Beach Apartments
festland.description: Dimitra Beach Apartments on the Greek mainland: holiday homes right on the seafront in Nea Karvali, opposite Thassos. Directly on the water, quiet and central.

hero.title: On the mainland
hero.sub: Opposite Thassos, near Kavala: our apartments in Nea Karvali sit right on the water – quiet, easy and ideal as an island alternative or a stop along the way.

intro.title: The sea right on your doorstep
intro.lead: Nea Karvali lies on the coast east of Kavala, looking across to the island of Thassos. Our apartments are right on the seafront – perfect for swimming, relaxed evenings by the water and as a base for trips on the mainland and to the ferry.

items.title: Right on the seafront
items.text: Apartments directly on the water – sea view and access without long walks.

items.title: Gateway to Thassos
items.text: The ferry to the island is quick to reach – ideal for combining both worlds.

items.title: Close to the airport
items.text: Kavala airport is just a short drive away – easy arrival and departure.

units.title: Apartments by the water
units.lead: The detail pages with photos and amenities of the mainland apartments are coming soon. Already now: fully equipped kitchen, private bathroom, Wi-Fi and the beach right outside.

cards.title: Apartment by the sea
cards.text: Fully equipped, right on the seafront. Details & photos in preparation.

cards.title: Further units
cards.text: Several apartments available. We're happy to advise on the right size.

lage.title: Between Kavala & Thassos
lage.lead: Nea Karvali is well connected – via Kavala airport and the ferry link to Thassos.
lage.note: Distances approximate – exact address & distances to be added.

cta.title: Prefer the mainland?
cta.lead: Tell us about your trip – we'll find the right apartment in Nea Karvali.

impressum.title: Imprint | Dimitra Beach Apartments
impressum.note: Please complete with the operator's real details in accordance with applicable law before publishing.

p: The contents of this website have been prepared with care. No liability is accepted for external links; the respective provider is responsible. All photos and texts are protected by copyright.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy | Dimitra Beach Apartments
datenschutz.description: Privacy policy of Dimitra Beach Apartments.
datenschutz.note: Replace before go-live with a legally compliant GDPR statement tailored to the actual setup (hosting, form delivery, booking tool, maps).

sections.h: 2. Data collected via the contact form
p: When you use the contact form, we process the data you provide (name, email, optionally phone, message) solely to handle your enquiry (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR).
When the website is accessed, technically necessary data (IP address, time, page requested) is processed. [Add host.]
Currently Google Fonts and OpenStreetMap maps are embedded externally. Before go-live, fonts will be self-hosted and maps embedded in a data-saving / two-click manner.
You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction, data portability and objection, as well as the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.
